app.name: Sports Event Manager
app.description: Plan and execute your sport event

errors.notAuthorized: You are not authorized to access this
errors.noAccess: Your account is not linked to any organization. Please contact your administrator.

notFoundPage.heading: No result for this checkpoint.
notFoundPage.body: The course doesn't run through here. Whatever you were looking for isn't part of this event.

errorPage.heading: Something broke mid-race.
errorPage.body: This checkpoint hit a snag. Try again — if it keeps happening, let your organizer know.
errorPage.toast: Something went wrong. Please try again.

actions.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedChanges.body: You have unsaved changes. If you leave, your changes will be lost.
